name: extra-product-data-for-woocommerce
description: Its a Wordpress plugin. Adds customizable input fields per product in WooCommerce.

scripts.development: npm run build:css && npm run build:img && vite build
scripts.watch: npm run build:img && npm run watch:css & vite build --watch
scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:img && vite build
scripts.production: npm run build:css && npm run build:img && vite build
scripts.plugin-zip: mkdir -p release && rsync -av --delete --exclude-from=".distignore" ./ release/extra-product-data-for-woocommerce/ && cd release && zip -r extra-product-data-for-woocommerce.zip extra-product-data-for-woocommerce && cd ..

author: triopsi
